stemHtml: Two routes of equal chart length are plotted on a Mercator chart. Route 1 is plotted at latitude of 25°N and route 2 at 65°N. The difference in longitude is the same for both routes and equal to 25°25'. Which statement is correct?

options.a: Route 2 is longer than route 1 by 738 NM.
options.b: Route 1 is longer than route 2 by 738 NM.
options.c: Route 1 is longer than route 2 by 756.6 NM.
options.d: Route 1 has the same length as route 2.
